task_objective: Fix CI uv sync failures caused by non-PEP-440 dev release tags on main.
design_decisions: Do not rely on hatch-vcs parsing development prerelease tags during regular CI dependency sync.
Use package.json version as SETUPTOOLS_SCM_PRETEND_VERSION in CI, matching the established dev-release workflow pattern.
Avoid changing release tags or hatch-vcs parsing rules because the dev tag's -dev.g suffix is not PEP 440.
results: ./run.sh uv run ty check py_modules/sdh_ludusavi/: passed
./run.sh pnpm run verify: passed with registry access for pnpm audit
